Title: Add product to wishlist
Step Action: Launch the URL https://demowebshop.tricentis.com/ in the browser.
Provide valid login credentials (Email: johnsmith@test.com, Password: xxx) and log in.
Step Expected: User logs into the application successfully.

Step Action: Click Electronics link in the left-most category menu.

Step Expected: Cell phone products list appears on the screen.
Product is added to wishlist successfully.

Step Action: Click Wishlist link in the top-right corner of the page.
Verify the selected product appears in the wishlist.
Step Expected: The system displays the added product in the wishlist.

Step Action: Click Logout link in the top-right corner of the page.
